title: Grilled Portuguese Fish Skewers
description: A delicious and flavorful dish featuring fresh fish marinated in a zesty Portuguese-inspired mixture. Perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cod cubes to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated cod onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
